name: Quiche Pastry
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Cold Butter, cut into small pieces
2 tbsp Vegetable Shortening, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add cold butter and shortening; rub with hands until fat is broken into pea-sized pieces (do not over-blend).
3. Gradually add ice water using a pastry knife, mixing until dough just begins to hold together.
4. Form the dough into a ball; lightly flour and wrap in waxed paper.
5. Chill for 1-2 hours in the refrigerator.
6. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Lightly flour work surface and rolling pin; roll out pastry to 1/8"-1/4" thickness.
8. Transfer dough to a 9-inch pie tin; press gently to fit edges, crimping as needed.
9. Line the pastry with buttered foil.
10. Fill center with dry beans or rice.
11. Bake in preheated oven for 8-9 minutes, until crust is set.
12. Remove foil and filling; prick bottom of dough with a fork.
13. Return to oven briefly (2-3 minutes) to finish setting the crust.
